issues.description: SearchDeck action is incomplete. The effect requires: (1) looking at 5 cards from top of deck, (2) revealing up to 1 Red-Haired Pirates type card, (3) adding it to hand, (4) placing the rest at the bottom in any order. Current DSL only captures a generic search with no deck size limit, card type filter, or bottom deck placement logic.
Filter is set to 'Any' but should specify CardType:'Red-Haired Pirates' and limit selection to up to 1 card.
Missing action to place non-selected cards at the bottom of the deck in any order. The DSL only handles the 'to hand' portion, not the deck organization step.
